name: reward-design-evaluation
paperTitle: Revisiting Reward Design and Evaluation for Robust Measurement of Progress in Reward Modeling for Language Modeling
content:
## Introduction

Naive reward metrics fail to capture true progress; systematic evaluation reveals hidden biases and measurement issues. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Naive reward metrics fail to capture true progress; systematic evaluation reveals hidden biases and measurement issues.

